entry.title: Nous Research's Hermes Agent Beats Claude and GPT-5.5 by Combining Them
entry.summary: Hermes Agent now lets you combine any frontier models into a single virtual model, beating gated APIs like Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 on Nous' upcoming benchmark.

entry.title: Google Boosts Gemini Nano on Pixel 50% Faster Without Retraining
entry.summary: Google retrofits Multi-Token Prediction onto frozen Gemini Nano v3, delivering 50%+ faster on-device inference on Pixel 9 and 10 without touching the base model

entry.title: Google's Antigravity 2.0 Ships Audio Support and Built-in Skill Guide
entry.summary: Google Antigravity 2.0 gets a built-in guide skill, audio rendering, and smarter file search in its latest CLI and app update

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Launches Under Unprecedented U.S. Government Restrictions
entry.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 family launches in limited preview at US government request, with Sol setting new agentic coding and cybersecurity benchmarks at a new naming tier structure

entry.title: Cerebras Bets on Grassroots Builders to Challenge Nvidia City by City
entry.summary: Cerebras launches a global Ambassador Program to seed grassroots AI communities around its record-breaking inference platform, fresh off a blockbuster IPO.

entry.title: Cerebras Runs Google DeepMind's Gemma 4 at 1,500 Tokens per Second
entry.summary: Gemma 4 31B lands on Cerebras Inference at 1,500 tokens/sec â 15x faster than Claude Haiku â with a 24-hour hackathon kicking off this Sunday

entry.title: Google Ships Gemini Live Real-Time Image Editing and Deep Think Reasoning
entry.summary: Google's June Gemini Drops bring real-time image editing in Live, business profile management, Google Play app installs in-chat, and thinking levels for all users

entry.title: Epoch's MirrorCode Benchmark Shows Claude Opus 4.7 Rebuilding Software Autonomously in 14 Hours
entry.summary: Epoch AI's MirrorCode benchmark shows Claude Opus 4.7 can autonomously reimplement entire codebases, completing tasks estimated to take human engineers weeks

entry.title: Lovable Lets Builders Add 10 AI Features With a Single Prompt
entry.summary: Lovable's built-in AI connector lets you add chatbots, image gen, RAG, and more to any app you build â no API keys, no provider accounts, just one prompt.

entry.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi Code Adds Shell Mode to Ditch Terminal Switching
entry.summary: Kimi Code v0.20 adds shell mode, background task management, remote web UI access, and multi-directory workspaces to its open-source coding agent CLI

entry.title: Sakana AI's CoffeeBench Catches Claude Haiku 4.5 Going Bankrupt Over 90 Days
entry.summary: Sakana AI's CoffeeBench puts LLM agents in charge of a coffee supply chain for 90 days â and the results reveal surprising gaps in long-horizon decision-making

entry.title: OpenAI's Codex Now Spins Up Persistent DigitalOcean Cloud Environments From a Prompt
entry.summary: A new DigitalOcean plugin for OpenAI Codex lets you spin up a persistent cloud dev environment with a single prompt, running in your own account even when you're offline.
